name: Rosemary Focaccia Bites
recipeIngredient: From a jar drained Scallions, chopped (same as green onions)
1/4 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and Chopped
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. On baking sheet, unroll pizza dough into an 8 x 12 rectangle. In small bowl combine oil, rosemary, salt, zest, and pepper. Brush dough with oil mixture, leaving a 1/4 border around edges. Sprinkle with roasted red peppers, scallions, and olives. Bake until golden brown, about 10-12 minutes. Cut into squares.
